title: Set up Lucia Auth v3 in Next.js
summary: Integrate Lucia v3 for session-based authentication — covers adapter setup (Drizzle or Prisma), session management, password hashing with Arctic OAuth helpers, and protected routes.
declaration: I will set up Lucia Auth v3 — a lightweight, framework-agnostic session management library. Lucia gives you full control over your auth logic (no magic, no provider lock-in). It works with any database via adapters. If you want a fully managed solution (Clerk, Auth.js), say so before I begin.
